more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Rewiring Zimbabwe’s Financial Future: Why Data, Infrastructure and Technology Are Now the Real Currency of Power
more.description: IN Zimbabwe, conversations about economic recovery have long been framed around currency stability, debt restructuring, and commodity exports. Yet beneath these familiar debates, a quieter but far more consequential transformation is underway—one that will determine whether the country merely survives or genuinely reinvents itself. That transformation lies in Financial Data, Infrastructure and Technology (FDIT), the [...] The post Rewiring Zimbabwe’s Financial Future: Why Data, Infrastructure and Technology Are Now the Real Currency of Power appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .
